details: Shape comparison uses height x width.
CRS must match before pixelwise deltas.
Transform must match before pixelwise deltas.
Nodata and dtype should be consistent across the micro-batch.
Pixel count should be identical for the four local rasters.
Local SOLWEIG raster paths should remain outside the Git worktree and under local_output_root.
QA writes only CSV/Markdown control artifacts.
